string.text: {=RmYnqr9H}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=mRPtQq5H}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the ancient lineages of Lithuania.
{=mmJXPATd}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME} one of the ancient lineages of Lithuania.

{=9VSfiK4b}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Lithuanians.
{=ET9vJQcn}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. The fame of our family is second to none in the songs of Europe.
{=FG8k4ePo}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. There's not a Christian family who hasn't contributed the head of one of their champions to our collection!
